title: submit_decision Request
description: Record a T0 decision event. Sent as JSON body on POST /v1/projects/:project_id/decisions. The daemon executes the write; T0 submits. Corresponds to t0_decision_log.jsonl entries (F36-R1/R1b).

id.description: Client-assigned id (ISO timestamp + suffix). Daemon uses this for idempotency. If omitted, daemon generates one.

open_items_actions.description: List of OI action strings, e.g. ['OI-003 closed: resolved by PR-2 merge'].

source.description: How this decision record was produced.
